Hero.compatible_rooms: Compatible with: Betclic, and more soon.

Features.title: Built for Spin Players
Features.subtitle: Everything you need to analyze your game and improve.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: View your performance at a glance. Recent sessions, winrate chart, and overall statistics.

handhistory.title: Hand History
handhistory.description: Browse your entire hand history. Advanced filters by player, position, street and more.

analysis.title: Deep Analysis
analysis.description: Analyze your mistakes and leaks with detailed statistics by situation. Identify weaknesses in your game.

replayer.title: Interactive Replayer
replayer.description: Review your sessions hand by hand. Analyze every street, check equities, and take notes on opponents.

range.title: Range Research
range.description: Study and refine your ranges with our comprehensive tool. Compare against opponent tendencies.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Configure auto-import of hands, room detection, and user preferences.

requirements.title: System Requirements

requirements.cpu_i5: Processor: Intel Core i5 or better

CTA.title: Ready to crush the competition?
CTA.description: Join hundreds of professional players who trust SpinTracker to improve their game.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how SpinTracker handles your data and privacy.

dataCollection.title: Data Collection
dataCollection.content: SpinTracker does not collect, store, or transmit any personal data, usage statistics, or other information from users. All data processed by the software remains entirely on your local device.

dataUsage.title: Data Usage
dataUsage.content: Since no data is collected or transmitted, there is no usage of personal data by SpinTracker or its services.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not share, sell, or transfer any data to third parties, as no data is collected from users.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: All data is stored locally on your device in the %APPDATA% folder. You are responsible for the security of your local data and device. We recommend using appropriate security measures to protect your files.

userRights.title: Your Rights
userRights.content: You have full control over your local data. You can access, modify, or delete any data stored by the software at any time.

updates.title: Policy Updates
updates.content: This Privacy Policy may be updated at any time. We encourage you to review it periodically.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at privacy@spintracker.com.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: These Terms of Service govern your use of SpinTracker software and website.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By downloading, installing, or using SpinTracker, you accept and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.

useLicense.title: Use License
useLicense.content: SpinTracker is currently provided free of charge. However, it may become a paid service in the future. You are granted a non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the software for personal, non-commercial purposes.

restrictions.title: Restrictions
restrictions.content: You are specifically restricted from: modifying, reverse engineering, or distributing the software; using it for any illegal purposes; or attempting to circumvent any security measures.

termination.title: Termination
termination.content: This license may be terminated if you violate these terms. Upon termination, you must cease using the software and delete all copies.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: The software is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We are not liable for any damages arising from your use of the software.

updates.title: Updates to Terms
updates.content: These Terms of Service may be updated at any time. Continued use of the software constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at legal@spintracker.com.
